contract_name: AbbVie SYNTHROID — Regional Health Plan Formularies

rebate_terms.notes: Regional Blues, exchange, and independent health-plan formularies in the demo set. IDs listed for joinable formularies. Additional demo files without printed IDs: 054_HealthNet_CA4Tier, 061_Regence_WA_Essential, 063_BCBSTennessee_Preferred, 064_BlueCrossNC_Essential5Tier, 065_CapitalBlueCross_ExclusiveFull, 066_IndependenceBC_SelectDrug, 068_CareFirst_FEHB, 069_Excellus_IndividualDrugList, 073_Geisinger_CommercialTraditional, 074_HarvardPilgrim_Premium3T, 075_Medica_CommercialDrugList, 076_HealthPartners_Formulary, 077_Providence_FormularyF, 078_PriorityHealth_ApprovedDrugList, 079_UPMC_Formulary, 080_CommunityHealthOptions_Formulary, 081_Presbyterian_GroupFormularies. Compliant demo terms (all UM allowed).
